blockNumber.description: Optional specific block number for point-in-time balance checks

chainId.description: Chain ID where the token contract is deployed (testnet or mainnet; must be supported/configured server-side)

minBalance.description: Minimum token balance required (human-readable units, e.g., "10.5")

ownerAddress.description: Token holder address (optional). If omitted, defaults to the signed request walletAddress. Deployments may allow delegated subject checks, but the server will not accept subject overrides that break signature binding.
